text: Maintaining a healthy lifestyle goes beyond just eating well and staying active. A balanced diet rich in fruits, vegetables, and whole grains provides your body with essential nutrients. Combined with regular exercise—like walking, cycling, or swimming—it helps keep your heart and muscles strong. However, many people overlook the importance of sleep and mental health. Aim for seven to nine hours of quality rest each night, and find time to relax or practise mindfulness. Equally important is achieving a healthy work-life balance. By managing your time wisely and setting boundaries, you reduce stress and create space for hobbies and relationships, which are vital for overall wellbeing.
